blocks.text: CL night: PSG's French derby and Madrid's slender lead on the line

Bodø/Glimt stunned Internazionale 2-1 in Milan on Tuesday — Norwegian football at its European peak. Now PSG guard a 3-2 aggregate lead against Monaco, and Madrid defend their slim advantage over Benfica.
⚽ Sat 16:00 — West Ham at Liverpool — PL title race, Liverpool under pressure
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Villarreal at Barcelona — La Liga title race for your favourites
